title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 11.070 - Duplication of official publications unlawful
text:
11.070.  Duplication of official publications unlawful. — It is unlawful for anyone to cause to be printed at state expense, any part, or any rearrangement of any part, of the official manual or any other public document required by law to be printed by any other department or office of this state.
(RSMo 1939 §§ 15003, 15007, 15010, A. 1949 S.B. 1004, A.L. 1957 p. 726) 
Prior revision: 1929 §§ 13810, 13814, 13817
